programs.title: Creek To Coast
programs.desc: This week we tackle Tasmania, rugged beauty and superb fishing awaits.

programs.title: Deadliest Roads
programs.desc: Lisa Kelly and G.W. take on the same road that almost sent G.W. over the edge the day before.

programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Pickle must face her fear of big cats as she continues to impress Troy with her natural snake hunting talent. Bill and Tes hunt stumble on a rumored government testing facility and find all they can handle. Dusty recruits a new hunting partner with a snake phobia while Zak and Aaron battle pythons and the supernatural.

programs.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programs.desc: Join Ricko as he heads to Broken Hill to tell of a wartime tragedy before he heads north to Longreach – the birthplace of Qantas and then onto Victoria for an epic tale of survival against the odds.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: A 1940s Hi-Striker carnival game is dropped off for restoration. Can Rick and his guys ring the bell or will the crew strike out? Later, the guys hammer away at fixing up a rare, handmade nail gun from the 1800s.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.
